context: Tests whether the agent applies the conversion-focused layout pattern from the skill: single CTA repeated 3x throughout the page, countdown or urgency copy in the hero, social proof above the fold, and an FAQ section at the bottom to handle objections.

checklist.name: CTA appears at least 3 times
checklist.description: The template or strategy doc shows the CTA (subscribe/buy button or equivalent) placed at least 3 distinct points in the page layout — not just once at the end

checklist.name: Hero contains urgency or countdown copy
checklist.description: The hero image-banner section in templates/page.cyber-monday.json contains copy referencing a deadline, limited time, countdown, or urgency (e.g., 'Nov 28–Dec 1', 'ends Monday', 'limited', '72 hours', or equivalent)

checklist.name: Social proof before first non-hero CTA
checklist.description: A social proof section (testimonials, reviews, subscriber count, or trust signal) appears in the page BEFORE the second CTA placement — establishing credibility above the fold before asking for action again

checklist.name: FAQ section present
checklist.description: templates/page.cyber-monday.json contains a section of type 'collapsible-content' serving as an FAQ — to handle objections

checklist.name: FAQ appears near end
checklist.description: The FAQ (collapsible-content) section appears near the end of the 'order' array — after product highlights and social proof, not at the top

checklist.name: Hero section present
checklist.description: templates/page.cyber-monday.json contains a section of type 'image-banner' as the hero

checklist.name: main-page section present
checklist.description: templates/page.cyber-monday.json contains a section of type 'main-page'

checklist.name: page-strategy.md explains CTA placement
checklist.description: page-strategy.md identifies all 3+ CTA placements by section name or position in the page scroll flow

checklist.name: page-strategy.md mentions objection handling
checklist.description: page-strategy.md explicitly addresses how the FAQ or objection-handling section reduces drop-off before exit

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/page.cyber-monday.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
